prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: project-bound RPG world atlas map, landscape orientation
Primary request: Deadlands / Weird West inspired world map for the terrain type diverse_archipelago.
Scene/backdrop: a vast haunted ocean frontier filled with many island groups and microcontinents, weird west boomtown islands, ghost-rock mining isles, flooded canyon labyrinths, cursed reefs, rail-ferry routes, steam-tech ports, mesa islands, desert islands, forested spirit lands, swamp deltas and supernatural dead zones.
Style/medium: high-resolution old frontier atlas, sepia parchment, engraved coastlines, watercolor terrain, weird western horror comedy mood, ghost-rock glow, steam machinery motifs, hand-drawn nautical cartography.
Composition/framing: wide landscape world map with unevenly distributed island clusters; large islands, tiny islets, crescent island arcs, lagoons, reef belts, remote atolls, narrow straits and fragmented coasts; no grid-like spacing; include a compass rose, decorative border, rail/ferry route symbols and mine icons with no readable text.
Geography constraints: islands must vary strongly in shape and size, with broken rocky shores, curving bays, peninsulas, canyons, deltas and volcanic ridges; show broad biome diversity across the archipelago including desert, prairie, mountains, pine forest, wetlands, salt flats and cursed wasteland.
Avoid: uniform round islands, tropical-only mood, clean pirate map cliche, modern satellite look, readable labels, UI, watermark, logo, real-world map copy.
